rw [iIndepFun_iff_measure_inter_preimage_eq_mul]
    intro S f hf
    rw [Bandit.streamMeasure]
    have h_set : (⋂ p ∈ S, (fun ω ↦ ω p.2 p.1) ⁻¹' f p ⁻¹' hf p) =
        ⋂ n ∈ S.image Prod.snd, (fun ω ↦ ω n) ⁻¹'
        (⋂ a ∈ (S.filter (fun p ↦ p.2 = n)).image Prod.fst, (fun x ↦ x a) ⁻¹' f (a, n) ⁻¹' hf (a, n)) := by
      ext ω; simp only [Set.mem_iInter, Set.mem_preimage, Finset.mem_image, Finset.mem_filter, Prod.exists]
      constructor
      · rintro h n m a ha rfl; exact h (a, n) ha
      · rintro h a n ha; exact h n n a ha rfl a ha rfl
    rw [h_set, iIndepFun_iff_measure_inter_preimage_eq_mul.1 (iIndepFun_pi _ _) _ _ (by fun_prop)]
    rw [Finset.prod_fiberwise_of_maps_to (fun p ↦ p.2) S]
    apply Finset.prod_congr rfl
    intro n hn
    rw [Measure.map_apply (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop), iIndepFun_iff_measure_inter_preimage_eq_mul.1 (iIndepFun_pi _ _) _ _ (by fun_prop)]
    rw [Finset.prod_image]
    · apply Finset.prod_congr rfl
      intro a ha
      rw [Measure.map_apply (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop), Bandit.streamMeasure,
        Measure.map_map (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop), Function.comp_def]
      simp_rw [(measurePreserving_eval_infinitePi _ _).map_eq, Measure.map_apply (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)]
      rfl
    · rintro x hx y hy hxy
      simp only [Finset.mem_filter] at hx hy
      ext
      · exact hxy
      · rw [hx.2, hy.2]
